political.s: Chobani has engaged in modest lobbying efforts since 2012, spending $50,000 in 2024 lobbying expenditures. The company made no direct political contributions in 2024. Founder Hamdi Ulukaya has connections to Democratic politicians including Chuck Schumer and Kirsten Gillibrand.

charity.s: Chobani commits to giving 10% of annual profits to charity and has donated millions of pounds of products annually to food banks and nonprofits. Since 2018, the company has contributed nearly $1.8 million through its Community Impact Fund grants supporting food security and community development in New York and Idaho.
charity.focus: Food security, child hunger relief, poverty reduction, entrepreneurship support

environment.s: Chobani emphasizes sustainability through renewable energy investments, water conservation initiatives, waste reduction, and sustainable sourcing from dairy farms. The company has reduced energy consumption by 17% since 2014 and partners with the World Wildlife Fund on environmental standards. However, detailed emissions data and specific net-zero commitments are not publicly available.

labor.s: Chobani employs approximately 30% refugees and immigrants and has prioritized inclusive hiring practices. The company conducted pay equity analyses finding no wage discrimination by gender or race. Average employee compensation ranges $44,000-$56,000 annually with competitive benefits, though manufacturing and frontline worker wages are lower than corporate roles.

dei.s: Chobani has established a dedicated Director of Diversity, Equity & Inclusion role and implemented DEI task forces across all locations. The company scored 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Corporate Equality Index for LGBTQ inclusion, expanded the Chobani Scholars Program with $1.4M+ commitment supporting underrepresented minorities in agriculture, and tied DEI goals to executive performance reviews.

animals.s: Not applicable—Chobani is a dairy yogurt manufacturer, not an organization conducting animal testing. The company sources milk from dairy farms participating in the National Dairy FARM Animal Care program.

guns.s: Not applicable—Chobani is a food and beverage company with no involvement in firearms manufacturing or sales.

privacy.s: Not disclosed. Limited public information available regarding Chobani's data privacy policies or practices.

execPay.s: Detailed CEO-to-worker pay ratio not publicly disclosed. Founder/CEO Hamdi Ulukaya has historically prioritized employee equity ownership; in 2016 the company gave 10% ownership stake to employees. Executive compensation data remains limited due to private company status.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
